@graph.name: US Dental Patient Recovery
@graph.description: Orthodontic patient recovery software for US ortho practices. Detect overdue retainer checks, observation patients, consult no-starts, and financing drop-offs. Free Ortho Recovery Audit. Recovery Launch $1,500 (refundable) + $997/mo Pro ($697/mo founding) + $1,497/mo per location.
@graph.slogan: Your next ten starts are already in your chart.

offers.name: Recovery Launch
offers.description: One-time activation — BAA execution, PMS connection, 72-hour signed audit, top 50 opportunities ranked. Refunded in full if the 60-day $5,000 shown-value guarantee misses.

offers.name: Ortho Recovery Pro
offers.description: Monthly subscription for single-location orthodontic practices. Weekly Friday report, shown-up attribution with matched holdout, quarterly CFO certification. Founding cohort rate: $697/month locked for life (first 10 practices only).

offers.name: Ortho Recovery Scale
offers.description: Multi-location orthodontic groups and DSOs. $1,497 per office per month. Portfolio dashboard, per-OM attribution, DSO-specific BAA terms. Six-month minimum.

mainEntity.name: Is this legal in my state?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We only contact your existing patients, under your practice name — follow-up care, not solicitation. We charge a flat SaaS fee, never per-patient, keeping the arrangement inside federal anti-kickback safe harbors and state patient-brokering statutes.

We sign a Business Associate Agreement before any patient data moves. We operate under 45 CFR §164.502 minimum-necessary standard. Every send, reply, and booking is logged in an append-only audit log. Data sits on encrypted volumes.

mainEntity.name: What does my treatment coordinator have to do?

acceptedAnswer.text: Open one email every Friday at 8 AM. It contains a ranked list of 12 patients to call today, with last week's shown-up results at the top. No dashboard to check, no app to open.
If we don't recover $5,000 in shown-up appointments in your first 60 days, the Recovery Launch fee is refunded in full — no hoops. Monthly subscription is month-to-month with no long-term contract.

mainEntity.name: Why flat fee and not pay-per-rebook?

acceptedAnswer.text: Per-patient payments trigger federal Anti-Kickback Statute concerns and state patient-brokering statutes (Florida's §817.505 treats it as a third-degree felony). Flat SaaS fee keeps the arrangement compliant under OIG Advisory Opinion 25-08 and keeps incentives aligned on quality.

mainEntity.name: How fast can I actually start?

acceptedAnswer.text: Connection takes about three business days under a signed BAA. Your first signed audit document arrives within 72 hours of connection. Your first Friday call list ships the next Friday at 8 AM.

mainEntity.name: What orthodontic PMS do you work with?

acceptedAnswer.text: Open Dental (REST), Dentrix (CSV), Cloud 9, and Ortho2 supported. Read-only access under a signed HIPAA Business Associate Agreement.
